rulings.Case Title: LAURA ESMERALDA CONTRERAS VS. CAROL BUTERWORTH et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Good Faith Settlement Determination
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, October 18, 2012, line 1. DEFENDANTs CAROL BUTTERWORTH and GORDON BUTTERWORTH'S Motion For Good Faith Settlement Determination. Motion for Good Faith Settlement Determination is Denied. Proposed settlement is not in the "ball park" of settlor's proportionate liability. Only one of five causes of action is alleged against Dowling Defendants and there is only one incident of tenant harassment in which Dowling was allegedly involved (TAC Paragraph 42), yet proposed settlor's liability is 41% of potential recoverable damages. (Moving Points and Authorities 6:12). = (AJR/501)

rulings.Case Title: BILL MOOMEY VS. CHASE BANK et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Jp Morgan Chase Bank'S Demurrer To First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, October 18, line 6. Defendant Jp Morgan Chase Bank'S Demurrer To First Amended Complaint. Defendant's Demurrer to First Amended Complaint is continued to November 14, 2012 pursuant to ex-parte order. = (AJR/501)

rulings.Case Title: ALEXANDER VILDERMAN VS. BANK OF AMERICA N.A. et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, October 18, line 2. DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, N.A., and RECONTRUST COMPANY, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Defendant's Demurrer is continued to 11/08/2012 for the moving party to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6C and provide a courtesy copy of the operative complaint no later than October 26, 2012 4pm. = (AJR/501)

rulings.Case Title: DMG ASSET MANAGEMENT, LLC VS. LAURENCE FAULKS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Relief From Forfeiture Under Ccp 1179; Points And Authorities And Declaration In Support
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, October 18, line 3. DEFENDANT LAURENCE FAULKS' Motion For Relief From Forfeiture Under Ccp 1179. Hearing Required to address existence of tenancy, e.g. cancelled checks, regular payments, rental agreement, third-party witness declarations, etc. = (AJR/501)

rulings.Case Title: JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, VS. LARRY CHEW et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, October 18, 2012, line 4. PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Plaintiff's Motion for Summary Judgment is granted, subject to opposition. = (AJR/501)

rulings.Case Title: MISSION BAY NORTH FINANCING LP VS. JAVIAN SANDHU et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, October 18, 2012, line 5. DEFENDANT JAVIAN SANDHU's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT. Defendant's Motion to Strike is DENIED. Defendant fails to point to any defect subject to motion to strike. = (AJR/501)
